corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

candidate.source_identity_note: aggregate pre-receipt revision; every selected case binds the exact final release package and evaluation input
candidate.selection_note: Seven receipts are first terminal results for their exact v15 inputs, six for v16 changed-or-previously-nonterminal inputs, and one for the changed v17 boundary input. No terminal input was rerun.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both receipts are the first terminal results for the exact final public-0.2 inputs and preserve the false-completion and review-quota false-stall contrast.

aggregation.method: first terminal receipt for each exact final input across v15, v16 changed-or-previously-nonterminal inputs, and the changed v17 boundary input
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked
